items.name: Seal Salve
items.description: Restores 30 seal integrity to a companion.

items.name: Focus Lens
items.description: Boosts Insight by 0.1 for one encounter.

items.name: Drift Anchor
items.description: Reduces drift level by 0.05. Stabilizes a volatile companion.

items.name: Ember Shard
items.description: Grants 0.5 KO tongue XP when consumed.

items.name: Gale Feather
items.description: Grants 0.5 AV tongue XP. Smells like sky.

items.name: Void Dust
items.description: Grants 0.5 RU tongue XP. Handle with care.

items.name: Proof Crystal
items.description: Boosts Proof Power by 0.15 for one encounter.

items.name: Ward Stone
items.description: Creates a temporary defensive ward. +20% defense for 3 turns.

items.name: Academy Enrollment Letter
items.description: Official enrollment to Avalon Academy. Given by Marcus Chen.

items.name: Elder Tomas's Package
items.description: A wrapped package for Marcus Chen. Smells like old paper.
